title: thlaspi zaffranii
intro: Thlaspi zaffranii, also known as Zaffrani mustard or wild mustard, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thlaspi zaffranii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and provide relief from sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and its seeds can be used as a spice to add flavor to various dishes.
